generated_oml:
instance SystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale teleoperated vehicle retrofitted with advanced sensor and control technology operates within the Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) domain for vehicular safety and automation"
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Handles data pre-processing, actuation, and device communication deployed on separate hardware component"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Manages data and control mechanisms deployed on separate hardware component"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Includes visualization and control panel subcomponents deployed on separate hardware component"
]

instance VedderESC : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller (ESC) that converts desired speed into motor voltage commands for precise vehicle motion control"
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor for environmental perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for environmental perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraData
]

instance VehicleStateSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring vehicle state (e.g., speed, steering angle)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateData
]

instance ObjectTrackingComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Component in physical twin producing object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ObjectTracksData
]

instance ProjectedPathComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Component in physical twin producing projected driving path"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ProjectedPathData
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensors
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ObjectTrackingComponent
]

instance ProjectedPathData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ProjectedPathComponent
]

instance LiDARRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data after transmission"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance DepthCameraRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw depth camera data after transmission"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state information after transmission"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks data after transmission"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance ProjectedPathRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Projected driving path data after transmission"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProjectedPathData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking software component for processing raw LiDAR data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 23247-compliant Data Translation component for serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversions"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ACCModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control model for determining lead vehicle position and computing optimal following speed"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance PointCloudClusteringDBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Point cloud clustering model using DBSCAN algorithm for processing raw LiDAR data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks data stored in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksData
]

instance EgoVehicleStateDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle state data stored in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "UI for real-time viewing, saving, and generating reports of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateViewing, RealTimeProjectedPathViewing, RealTimeObjectTrackViewing, SaveVehicleStateData, SaveProjectedPathData, SaveObjectTrackData, GenerateReport
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC system to cloud resources to determine lead vehicle, compute desired speed based on distance, and send commands back to the vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehiclePositionInsight, OptimalFollowingSpeedInsight, SendCommandToVehicle
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enabling/disabling ACC, setting desired speed, and sending emergency braking commands remotely"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACC, DisableACC, SetDesiredSpeed, SendEmergencyBrakingCommand
]

instance RealTimeVehicleStateViewing : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time viewing of vehicle state data"
]

instance RealTimeProjectedPathViewing : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time viewing of projected driving path"
]

instance RealTimeObjectTrackViewing : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time viewing of detected object tracks"
]

instance SaveVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Saving vehicle state data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SaveProjectedPathData : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Saving projected driving path data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SaveObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Saving object track data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance GenerateReport : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generating reports of vehicle state, projected path, and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LeadVehiclePositionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight about lead vehicle position for ACC"
]

instance OptimalFollowingSpeedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight about optimal following speed for ACC"
]

instance SendCommandToVehicle : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sending commands back to vehicle for ACC control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enabling Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disabling Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Setting desired speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SendEmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sending emergency braking command remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ROS2 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 middleware for inter-component communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration and AI processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for system modeling and simulation of complex dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals for Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC), motor actuation, and steering servo are sent from the Controlling FE to physical components via Wi-Fi UDP. Data Translation serializes control messages and performs unit conversions as part of inter-entity communication."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Clock synchronization requirement of 100 ms accuracy for safety-critical vehicular applications due to hardware limitations, enabling computation offloading between devices."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Architecture based on ISO 23247 RA, with software components mapped to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as individual ROS2 packages; each FE's functionality is encapsulated in ROS2 nodes, organized into Physical Twin, Digital Twin, and User Entities deployed on different hardware."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Intra-Digital Twin software component communication occurs via ROS2, and inter-entity communication between physical and digital entities uses Wi-Fi network with UDP transport layer protocol."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Complies with ISO 23247 standard (Part 2: Reference Architecture), which defines an entity-based structure comprising Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, User Entity, and Functional Entities. Interoperability is supported through implementations such as OPC Unified Architecture."
]
